alert2: To see how Facebook and Instagram users interacted with the content on your website, we have to connect to your Metal Pixel ID

userManagement.title: Staff Management
userManagement.inviteOthers: You can invite other colleagues or students to join your site, and they can help you manage payments and classes.
userManagement.noUsers: You don't have any users for this school yet.
userManagement.enterEmail: Enter the email you want to invite:
userManagement.failToInviteUser: Failed to invite user. Please try again.
userManagement.name: Name
userManagement.enterName: Enter the name you want to invite
userManagement.enterPhone: Enter the phone you want to invite
userManagement.assignRoleDesc: Select a role for the user to grant the access to your resources.
userManagement.updateRoleSuccess: User role has been updated successfully!
userManagement.inviteLinkProvide: Invited user can accept your invitation by the link below.
userManagement.userAlreadyExists: User already exists. Please enter another email or ask the current user to delete the account.
userManagement.cannotInviteYourself: You cannot invite yourself. Please enter another email.
userManagement.pleaseLogout: You are currently logged in. Please log out before accepting the invitation.

hourlyRates.zeroRateError: Hourly rate cannot be 0. Please set a valid rate for all entries.
hourlyRates.salaryByClassDescription: Set a fixed base hourly salary for each class, regardless of ihe number of students enrolled. The instructor will receive the same rate per hour for teaching the class, whether it has one student or many.
hourlyRates.minimumStudentsDescription: Set the minimum number of students before additional salary is applied. When set to 0, additional salary is calculated starting from the first student.
hourlyRates.additionalSalaryByStudentDescription: Extra amount per student above the minimum. This is added on top of the base salary for each additional student.
hourlyRates.duplicateClassError: Selected classes are already added. Please choose different classes.
hourlyRates.selectAtLeastOneClass: Please select at least one class.
hourlyRates.invalidHourlyRate: Hourly rate must be greater than 0.
hourlyRates.classSpecificStudentRatesHint: Leave empty to use default settings

webpageSetting.timezoneHint: The timezone follows the default country. If you want to change it, please change your default country.
webpageSetting.currencyHint: The currency follows the default country. If you want to change it, please change your default country.
webpageSetting.updateSuccess: You have updated the site settings successfully
webpageSetting.updateError: Something went wrong while updating webpage settings. Please try again later
webpageSetting.changeCountryHint: Course prices and timeslots will not automatically convert to the new currency and timezone

templateDescriptions.minimal: A template with navigation bar on the top. Suitable for a standalone website.
templateDescriptions.vertical: A template with a side bar menu on the left. Suitable as a platform for your existing website.
templateDescriptions.hero: A template with a large hero image at the top of the page. Suitable for a standalone website.
templateDescriptions.barebone: The simplest layout with no navigation bar. Only with your logo on the top. Suitable to be embedded in other websites.

paymentSetting.stripePaymentMethod: Connect to Stripe and start accepting online payments quickly and securely with our software. Stripe can provide multiple payment options for your students, including
paymentSetting.ifHavePreviousAccount: If you have a Stripe account, please log in with the same email and password to skip the onboarding process.
paymentSetting.whyManageAccount: Simplify tuition payment management with our software integrated with Stripe. Easily manage payments, track tuition history, and streamline administrative tasks for teachers and educators.
paymentSetting.pleaseLoginConnect: Please log into your Stripe account with the same email and password you have used to create your Stripe account.
paymentSetting.notCompleteOnboarding: You have not linked your Stripe account. Please complete the onboarding process to visit your dashboard
paymentSetting.updateSuccess: You will be redirected to Stripe to complete the onboarding process. See you soon!
paymentSetting.dashboardSuccess: You will be able to view all your transactions in the new tab!
paymentSetting.completePayout: Complete business details to enable payout
paymentSetting.completeOnboarding: Please complete the onboarding process on Stripe to visit your dashboard, Once the process is completed, Stripe will be displayed as a payment option for students
paymentSetting.noStripeAccount: You have not created a Stripe account yet.
paymentSetting.migratingStripe: We are currently migrating your Stripe account to our new system. You will need to create a new Stripe account. If you still have funds in your previous Stripe account, please contact us using the chat box in the corner and we will pay them out.
paymentSetting.connectStripeTips: Getting ready to create a Stripe account for collecting payments!
paymentSetting.createStripeAccountReminder: Please ensure that the country you select in the site settings matches the country you intend to register with on Stripe. Once registered, it will not be possible to modify your country on Stripe. If you need to change your country, you can do so by adjusting the settings on the site.
paymentSetting.createStripeAccountDescription:
Current country: {{country}}.
Current email: {{email}}.
Please make sure both your country and email address are correct before creating a Stripe account. Once the account is created by clicking “Confirm”, neither your country nor your email can be changed on Stripe.

If you wish to use a different email, please log in to the correct account and return to this page.
paymentSetting.createStripeAccountProblem: *If you run into any issues while creating a Stripe account, please don't hesitate to reach out to us via email (admin@flowclass.io) or the chat box in the corner.

customizeSite.title: Domain Settings
customizeSite.inputReminder: Please only use alphabets and numbers. No special characters allowed.
customizeSite.description: This will be the link your students will use to access your site. If you change it, the students will not be able to access using the old link.
customizeSite.description2: Enter any domain for your site (e.g. example.com, localhost). You can also connect your own custom domain according to this guide.
customizeSite.useOwnDomain: You can connect your own domain to your site.
customizeSite.invalidCustomDomain: Domain should only contain alphabets and numbers. No special characters allowed
customizeSite.customDomainGuide: Once you have saved your own domain, please contact us to seek assistance in completing the setup process for your domain.
customizeSite.planRestriction: This feature is only applicable to the growth tier or higher

notificationSettings.title: Payment Reminder Settings
notificationSettings.description: You can choose to send reminder notifications via email.
notificationSettings.schedule: An email will be sent to the student the first day after the application date, and every 4 days after that.
notificationSettings.tierRestriction: This feature is only applicable to the growth tier or higher
notificationSettings.updateSuccess: You have successfully updated notification setting.

lessonReminderSettings.title: Lesson Reminder Settings
lessonReminderSettings.description: You can choose to send reminder notifications via email.
lessonReminderSettings.schedule: An email will be sent to the student before the lesson day
lessonReminderSettings.tierRestriction: This feature is only applicable to the growth tier or higher
lessonReminderSettings.updateSuccess: You have successfully updated notification setting.

systemSettings.inBeta: This feature is currently in beta so it only applies to recurring classes. All closed time will prevent students from booking classes.
systemSettings.notification: If a lesson is on 'Blocked time', then that lesson and afterwards will be delayed by its recurring condition.

systemSettings.createBlockTimeSuccess: You have created block time successfully
systemSettings.noBlockTime: You have no block time yet. Please create a new block time.
systemSettings.warningBlockTime: The selected block time overlaps with an existing class schedule. Please choose a different time slot

studentInformation.noFields: You don't have any created custom data fields
studentInformation.titleDeleteDialog: Do you want to delete custom field:
studentInformation.descriptionDelete: This action is irreversible. Relevant student information stored under this field will ALL be removed from the student profile.
studentInformation.notification: Custom data fields are used to store information of a student (i.e. parent contact and academic level) into their profile. These fields can be used to create application forms for students to fill in when they are applying for a course.
studentInformation.descriptionCreate: Only field name can be changed afterwards
studentInformation.descriptionEdit: Only field name can be changed
studentInformation.descriptionReorder: Reordering the custom field will affect their order in student profiles.
studentInformation.descriptionAddOption: Please add options for users to choose

applicationForm.description: You should create custom data fields first before creating application form.
applicationForm.descriptionCreate: For your recognition and will not be shown to students.
applicationForm.commonInformation: The fields here will be shown when you assign the form to a class option which accept multiple applicants
applicationForm.description2Create: Please select the fields to be included in the application form. Name, Email and Phone Number are compulsory for the system record. To further modify the custom field, please go to
applicationForm.dragAndDrop: You can drag the fields to rearrange their orders
applicationForm.titleDeleteDialog: Do you want to delete application form:
applicationForm.notification: Student custom fields are used to store information of a student (i.e. parent contact and academic level) in their profile. These fields can be used to create application forms for students to fill in when they are applying for a course.
applicationForm.noForms: You have not created any application form
applicationForm.descriptionApplicatFields: These fields collect specific details for each individual applicant, such as name, date of birth, and contact information. If the application involves multiple people, these fields will be replicated for each person. If you need to modify the fields, please visit
applicationForm.descriptionCommonFields:
These fields relate to the entire application and include information such as purpose, relationship between applicants and desired outcomes. 
They are filled out once at the conclusion of the application process. If you need to modify the fields, please visit

whatsappSetting.settingHints: We connect with Twilio to send WhatsApp messages. If you need help, we can help you with the setup.
whatsappSetting.reminder: You should set up WhatsApp API before sending messages to students.
whatsappSetting.phoneNumberReceiver: Testing phone number for receiving message
whatsappSetting.customMessageExample: Your customized message will be sent to students. Eg. Hello! We are {{schoolName}}. This is a friendly reminder.
whatsappSetting.sendTestMsgSuccess: You have successfully sent the whatsapp message.
whatsappSetting.sendMaterialPlaceholder:
Hi {{studentName}} New materials uploaded to {{courseName}},

Just a quick note to let you know that a new material has been uploaded to the course.

Best regards,
{{institutionName}}
whatsappSetting.sendStudentSubmissionPlaceholder:
Hi {{studentName}} New student submissions for {{className}},

Just a quick note to let you know that a new feedback has been submitted.

Best regards,
{{institutionName}}

studentPortal.choosePrimaryIdentifier: Choose the primary identifier for students to be registered and logged in.

studentPortal.note: Note: After enabling this option, students will no longer be required to provide an email address to register or access the website.

creditSystem.title: Credit System
creditSystem.descriptionEnable: Users will see their available credit balance on their dashboard. You can assign, top-up, or deduct credits for users at any time.
creditSystem.descriptionDisable: Disabling will not affect existing credit balances, but users will return to using standard payment methods.
creditSystem.conversionRatioForCreditsDescription: Determines how much each credit is worth in your system's default currency.
creditSystem.conversionRatioExample: For example: If 1 credit = $1.00, the conversion ratio is 1:1. If 10 credits = $1.00, the conversion ratio is 10:1. If 1 credit = $0.50, the conversion ratio is 1:0.5.
